noArgs.stderr:
usage: maw hey <target> <message> [--inbox] [--force deprecated] [--approve] [--trust]
  default: write receiver inbox and inject into the target pane
  --inbox: write receiver inbox only; skip pane injection
  --force: deprecated compatibility alias; delivery is already forced by default
  target forms:
    <oracle-window>              same-node window name (local-only)
    local:<agent>                explicit same-node target
    <session>:<window>[.<pane>]  paste a TARGET from maw ls -v
    <node>:<session>             canonical cross-node form (window 1)
    <node>:<session>:<window>    target a specific tmux window (#410)
  e.g. maw hey mawjs-oracle "hello from neo"
       maw hey local:mawjs "hello from neo"
       maw hey phaith:01-hojo:3 "hello hojo-hermes"
       run `maw locate <agent>` to enumerate across federation

routeError.stderr:
error: bare target 'nonexistent-target-xyz' not found locally

  same-node targets:
    maw hey local:nonexistent-target-xyz "..."
    or copy a TARGET from `maw ls -v`

  cross-node targets:
    maw hey <node>:nonexistent-target-xyz "..."
    maw hey <node>:<session>:<window> "..."

  bare names are local-only; run `maw locate nonexistent-target-xyz` to enumerate federation candidates
